data.name: AccessStringInvalidSyntax
data.value: Access string has invalid syntax.

data.name: ActualHasMismatchedElements
data.value: The expected collection contains {1} occurrence(s) of <{2}>. The actual collection contains {3} occurrence(s). {0}

data.name: AllItemsAreUniqueFailMsg
data.value: Duplicate item found:<{1}>. {0}

data.name: AreEqualFailMsg
data.value: Expected:<{1}>. Actual:<{2}>. {0}

data.name: AreEqualDeltaFailMsg
data.value: Expected a difference no greater than <{3}> between expected value <{1}> and actual value <{2}>. {0}

data.name: AreEqualCaseFailMsg
data.value: Expected:<{1}>. Case is different for actual value:<{2}>. {0}

data.name: AreEqualStringDiffExpectedPrefix
data.value: Expected:

data.name: AreEqualStringDiffActualPrefix
data.value: But was:

data.name: AreEqualStringDiffLengthBothMsg
data.value: String lengths are both {0} but differ at index {1}.

data.name: AreEqualStringDiffLengthDifferentMsg
data.value: Expected string length {0} but was {1}.

data.name: AreEquivalentFailedSummary
data.value: Expected values to be structurally equivalent.

data.name: AreEquivalentFailedSummaryStrict
data.value: Expected values to be structurally equivalent (strict mode).

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchActualDictionaryThrew
data.value: reading the actual dictionary threw {0}: {1}.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchActualEnumerationThrew
data.value: enumerating the actual collection threw {0}: {1}.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchActualMemberThrew
data.value: reading the actual member threw {0}: {1}.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchAt
data.value: Mismatch at '{0}': {1}
data.comment: {0} is a member path (e.g., 'Order.Items[2].Price'), {1} is a localized reason describing the kind of mismatch.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchExpectedDictionaryThrew
data.value: reading the expected dictionary threw {0}: {1}.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchExpectedEnumerationThrew
data.value: enumerating the expected collection threw {0}: {1}.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchExpectedMemberThrew
data.value: reading the expected member threw {0}: {1}.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchExtraMembers
data.value: actual has unexpected members not present on expected: {0}.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchIEquatableThrew
data.value: IEquatable.Equals threw {0}: {1}.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchLength
data.value: collections differ in length (expected {0} elements, actual {1}).

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchMaxDepth
data.value: comparison exceeded the maximum supported depth of {0}.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchMissingKey
data.value: key {0} present on expected is missing from actual.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchMissingMember
data.value: member '{0}' present on expected is missing from actual.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchNull
data.value: one side is null, the other is not.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchTopology
data.value: graph topology differs (the same reference on one side appears paired with different references on the other side).

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchType
data.value: incompatible types (expected '{0}', actual '{1}').

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchUnexpectedKey
data.value: key {0} present on actual is not on expected.

data.name: AreEquivalentMismatchValue
data.value: values are not equal.

data.name: AreEquivalentRootPath
data.value: <root>
data.comment: Placeholder used in equivalence-mismatch messages when the difference is at the top of the object graph.

data.name: AreNotEqualDeltaFailMsg
data.value: Expected a difference greater than <{3}> between expected value <{1}> and actual value <{2}>. {0}

data.name: AreNotEqualFailMsg
data.value: Expected any value except:<{1}>. Actual:<{2}>. {0}

data.name: AreNotEquivalentComparisonFailedSummary
data.value: Could not complete structural comparison.

data.name: AreNotEquivalentComparisonFailedSummaryStrict
data.value: Could not complete structural comparison (strict mode).

data.name: AreNotEquivalentFailedSummary
data.value: Expected values to be structurally different.

data.name: AreNotEquivalentFailedSummaryStrict
data.value: Expected values to be structurally different (strict mode).

data.name: AreSameExpectedIsNull
data.value: Expected is <null>. {0}

data.name: AreSameActualIsNull
data.value: Actual is <null>. {0}

data.name: AreSameGivenValues
data.value: Do not pass value types to AreSame(). Values converted to Object will never be the same. Consider using AreEqual(). {0}

data.name: AreNotSameBothNull
data.value: Both values are <null>. {0}

data.name: BothCollectionsEmpty
data.value: Both collections are empty. {0}

data.name: BothCollectionsSameElements
data.value: Both collection contain same elements.

data.name: BothCollectionsSameReference
data.value: Both collection references point to the same collection object. {0}

data.name: BothSameElements
data.value: Both collections contain the same elements. {0}

data.name: ContainsFail
data.value: String '{0}' does not contain string '{1}'. {2}.

data.name: IsInRangeFail
data.value: Value '{0}' is not within the expected range [{1}..{2}]. {3}

data.name: ElementNumbersDontMatch
data.value: The number of elements in the collections do not match. Expected:<{1}>. Actual:<{2}>.{0}

data.name: ElementsAtIndexDontMatch
ElementTypesAtIndexDontMatch
data.value: Element at index {1} is not of expected type. Expected type:<{2}>. Actual type:<{3}>.{0}

data.name: EndsWithFail
data.value: String '{0}' does not end with string '{1}'. {2}

data.name: AssertionFailed
data.value: {0} failed.

data.name: IsInstanceOfFailMsg
data.value: {0} Expected type:<{1}>. Actual type:<{2}>.

data.name: IsMatchFail
data.value: String '{0}' does not match pattern '{1}'. {2}

data.name: IsNotInstanceOfFailMsg
data.value: Wrong Type:<{1}>. Actual type:<{2}>. {0}

data.name: IsExactInstanceOfFailMsg
data.value: {0} Expected exact type:<{1}>. Actual type:<{2}>.

data.name: IsNotExactInstanceOfFailMsg
data.value: Wrong exact Type:<{1}>. Actual type:<{2}>. {0}

data.name: IsNotMatchFail
data.value: String '{0}' matches pattern '{1}'. {2}

data.name: PrivateAccessorMemberNotFound
data.value: The member specified ({0}) could not be found. You might need to regenerate your private accessor, or the member may be private and defined on a base class. If the latter is true, you need to pass the type that defines the member into PrivateObject's constructor.

data.name: PrivateAccessorConstructorNotFound
data.value: The constructor with the specified signature could not be found. You might need to regenerate your private accessor, or the member may be private and defined on a base class. If the latter is true, you need to pass the type that defines the member into PrivateObject's constructor.

data.name: NullParameterToAssert
data.value: The parameter '{0}' is invalid. The value cannot be null.

data.name: NumberOfElementsDiff
data.value: Different number of elements.

data.name: StartsWithFail
data.value: String '{0}' does not start with string '{1}'. {2}

data.name: InvalidPropertyType
data.value: The property {0} has type {1}; expected type {2}.

data.name: Common_NullInMessages
data.value: (null)

data.name: Common_ObjectString
data.value: (object)

data.name: UTF_FailedToGetExceptionMessage
data.value: (Failed to get the message for an exception of type {0} due to an exception.)

data.name: NoExceptionThrown
data.value: Expected exception type:<{1}> but no exception was thrown. {0}

data.name: WrongExceptionThrown
data.value: Expected exception type:<{1}>. Actual exception type:<{2}>. {0}

data.name: DynamicDataIEnumerableNull
data.value: Property or method {0} on {1} return type is not assignable to 'IEnumerable'.

data.name: DynamicDataValueNull
data.value: Value returned by property or method {0} shouldn't be null.

data.name: DynamicDataDisplayName
data.value: Method {0} must match the expected signature: public static {1} {0}({2}).

data.name: DynamicDataIEnumerableEmpty
data.value: Property or method {0} on {1} returns empty IEnumerable<object[]>.

data.name: DynamicDataInvalidMethodLayout
data.value: Dynamic data method '{0}' should be static, non-generic, and cannot have 'params' parameter.

data.name: DynamicDataInvalidPropertyLayout
data.value: Dynamic data property '{0}' should be static and have a getter.

data.name: DynamicDataInvalidFieldLayout
data.value: Dynamic data field '{0}' should be static.

data.name: DynamicDataSourceShouldExistAndBeValid
data.value: The dynamic data source '{0}' in type '{1}' should exist and be a property, a method, or a field.

data.name: ContainsSingleMatchFailMsg
data.value: Expected exactly one item to match the predicate but found {1} item(s). {0}

data.name: ContainsSingleFailMsg
data.value: Expected collection to contain exactly one element but found {1} element(s). {0}

data.name: ContainsItemFailMsg
data.value: Expected collection to contain the specified item. {0}

data.name: ContainsPredicateFailMsg
data.value: Expected at least one item to match the predicate. {0}

data.name: DoesNotContainItemFailMsg
data.value: Expected collection to not contain the specified item. {0}

data.name: DoesNotContainPredicateFailMsg
data.value: Expected no items to match the predicate. {0}

data.name: InvalidGitHubUrl
data.value: Invalid GitHub ticket URL

data.name: DoesNotContainFail
data.value: String '{0}' does contain string '{1}'. {2}.

data.name: DoesNotEndWithFail
data.value: String '{0}' ends with string '{1}'. {2}

data.name: DoesNotStartWithFail
data.value: String '{0}' starts with string '{1}'. {2}

data.name: DoNotUseAssertEquals
data.value: Assert.Equals should not be used for Assertions. Please use Assert.AreEqual & overloads instead.

data.name: DoNotUseAssertReferenceEquals
data.value: Assert.ReferenceEquals should not be used for Assertions. Please use Assert.AreSame & overloads instead.

data.name: DoNotUseStringAssertEquals
data.value: StringAssert.Equals should not be used for Assertions. Please use StringAssert methods or Assert.AreEqual & overloads instead.

data.name: DoNotUseStringAssertReferenceEquals
data.value: StringAssert.ReferenceEquals should not be used for Assertions. Please use StringAssert methods or Assert.AreSame & overloads instead.

data.name: DoNotUseCollectionAssertEquals
data.value: CollectionAssert.Equals should not be used for Assertions. Please use CollectionAssert.AreEqual & overloads instead.

data.name: DoNotUseCollectionAssertReferenceEquals
data.value: CollectionAssert.ReferenceEquals should not be used for Assertions. Please use CollectionAssert methods or Assert.AreSame & overloads instead.

data.name: InvalidAccessToTestContextProperty
data.value: The property 'TestContext.{0}' is related to current test is not available during assembly or class fixtures.

data.name: CallerArgumentExpressionSingleParameterMessage
data.value: '{0}' expression: '{1}'.
data.comment: Example: "'value' expression: 'new object()'", where 'value' is the parameter name of an assertion method, and 'new object()' is the expression the user passed to the assert method.

data.name: AssertThatMessageFormat
data.value: Message: {0}

data.name: AssertThatDetailsPrefix
data.value: Details:

data.name: CallerArgumentExpressionTwoParametersMessage
data.value: '{0}' expression: '{1}', '{2}' expression: '{3}'.
data.comment: Example: "'minValue' expression: 'userCode1', 'maxValue' expression: 'userCode2', 'value' expression: 'userCode3'", where 'minValue', 'maxValue', and 'value' are the parameter names of an assertion method, and 'userCode's are the expressions the user passed to the assert method.

data.name: CallerArgumentExpressionThreeParametersMessage
data.value: '{0}' expression: '{1}', '{2}' expression: '{3}', '{4}' expression: '{5}'.
data.comment: Example: "'substring' expression: 'userCode1', 'value' expression: 'userCode2'", where 'substring' and 'value' are the parameter names of an assertion method, and 'userCode's are the expressions the user passed to the assert method.

data.name: ReturnedSubsetValueMessage
data.value: Element(s) <{0}> is/are not present in the collection.

data.name: IsInRangeMaxValueMustBeGreaterThanOrEqualMinValue
data.value: The maximum value must be greater than or equal to the minimum value.

data.name: AssertScopeFailure
data.value: {0} assertion(s) failed within the assert scope.
data.comment: {0} is the number of assertion failures collected in the scope.

data.name: AssertScopeNestedNotAllowed
data.value: Nested assert scopes are not allowed. Dispose the current scope before creating a new one.

data.name: STATestMethodNonWindowsNotSupported
data.value: [STATestMethod] is not supported on non-Windows platforms. STA (Single Threaded Apartment) is a Windows-only COM threading concept. Use [OSCondition(OperatingSystems.Windows)] to skip this test on non-Windows platforms.

data.name: IsTrueFailedSummary
data.value: Expected condition to be true.

data.name: IsFalseFailedSummary
data.value: Expected condition to be false.

data.name: IsNullFailedSummary
data.value: Expected value to be null.

data.name: IsNotNullFailedSummary
data.value: Expected value to not be null.

data.name: HasCountFailedSummary
data.value: Expected collection to contain a specific number of elements.

data.name: IsEmptyFailedSummary
data.value: Expected collection to be empty.

data.name: IsNotEmptyFailedSummary
data.value: Expected collection to not be empty.

data.name: AreAllNotNullFailedSummary
data.value: Expected all items in collection to be non-null.

data.name: AreAllDistinctFailedSummary
data.value: Expected all items in collection to be distinct.

data.name: AreAllOfTypeFailedSummary
data.value: Expected all items in collection to be of the specified type.

data.name: MatchesRegexFailedSummary
data.value: Expected string to match the specified regular expression.

data.name: DoesNotMatchRegexFailedSummary
data.value: Expected string to not match the specified regular expression.

data.name: ContainsSingleFailedSummary
data.value: Expected collection to contain exactly one element.

data.name: ContainsSingleMatchFailedSummary
data.value: Expected collection to contain exactly one element matching the predicate.

data.name: ContainsItemFailedSummary
data.value: Expected collection to contain the specified element.

data.name: ContainsPredicateFailedSummary
data.value: Expected collection to contain an element matching the predicate.

data.name: ContainsSubstringFailedSummary
data.value: Expected string to contain the specified substring.

data.name: DoesNotContainItemFailedSummary
data.value: Expected collection to not contain the specified element.

data.name: DoesNotContainPredicateFailedSummary
data.value: Expected collection to not contain an element matching the predicate.

data.name: DoesNotContainSubstringFailedSummary
data.value: Expected string to not contain the specified substring.

data.name: IsInRangeFailedSummary
data.value: Expected value to be within the inclusive range.

data.name: IsGreaterThanFailedSummary
data.value: Expected value to be greater than the lower bound.

data.name: IsGreaterThanOrEqualToFailedSummary
data.value: Expected value to be greater than or equal to the lower bound.

data.name: IsLessThanFailedSummary
data.value: Expected value to be less than the upper bound.

data.name: IsLessThanOrEqualToFailedSummary
data.value: Expected value to be less than or equal to the upper bound.

data.name: IsPositiveFailedSummary
data.value: Expected value to be positive.

data.name: IsNegativeFailedSummary
data.value: Expected value to be negative.

data.name: StartsWithFailedSummary
data.value: Expected string to start with the specified prefix.

data.name: DoesNotStartWithFailedSummary
data.value: Expected string to not start with the specified prefix.

data.name: EndsWithFailedSummary
data.value: Expected string to end with the specified suffix.

data.name: DoesNotEndWithFailedSummary
data.value: Expected string to not end with the specified suffix.
